Name: Pattern Recognition - PE
Text: Analyze User Input Input A DECLARE model representing a loan application process structured as a dictionary of constraint types with activities and support confidence values all 10 Activity Descriptions Provided Request Describe the underlying loan approval process stepbystep Explain how constraints ensure compliance logical order Discuss realworld motivations Speculate on consequences

Name: Deductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Key DECLARE Constraint Semantics Mental Reference existenceA A must occur at least once absenceA A must never occur exactlyoneA A must occur exactly once initA A must be the first activity respondedexistenceA B If A occurs B must occur at least once coexistenceA B A occurs iff B occurs responseA B If A occurs B must occur later precedenceA B B can only occur if A has occurred before successionA B A must happen before B and both must happen altresponseA B If A occurs B must occur at least once after A altprecedenceA B B requires A before chainresponseA B B immediately after A and so on

Name: Inductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Lets map the constraints to the process flow initReceiveApplication Process starts with receiving application existence both must occur absenceProceedWithoutCompliance never happens exactlyonePreliminaryCreditCheck responseReceiveApplication PreliminaryCreditCheck successionPreliminaryCreditCheck GatherAdditionalDocuments coexistenceGatherAdditionalDocuments AuthorizeContractTerms precedenceQualityAssuranceReview AuthorizeContractTerms and so on

Name: Validation - NE
Text: altprecedenceNotifyCustomer TransferFunds TransferFunds requires NotifyCustomer first thats odd for a loan process chainprecedenceAuthorizeContractTerms PreliminaryCreditCheck PreliminaryCreditCheck must immediately follow AuthorizeContractTerms thats backwards noncoexistenceTransferFunds ReceiveApplication they cant both occur in same trace weird for single loan process

Name: Abductive Reasoning - PE
Text: Reconstruct the intended logical flow based on standard loan processing and the constraints 1 Start ReceiveApplication 2 PreliminaryCreditCheck exactly once after receive 3 GatherAdditionalDocuments after credit check 4 QualityAssuranceReview after docs 5 AssembleLoanOfferPackage immediately after QA 6 AuthorizeContractTerms after QA 7 TransferFunds immediately after Assemble 8 NotifyCustomer tied to transfer Forbidden ProceedWithoutCompliance

Name: Backtracking - PE
Text: SelfCorrectionVerification during thought noncoexistence likely indicates constraint across different process instances chainprecedence backwards likely modeling artifact or syntax inversion interpret as system safeguards or compliance checkpoint note apparent contradictions as modeling artifacts focus on intended business logic

Name: Heuristic Reasoning - PE
Text: Structure the response 1 StepbyStep Process Narrative 2 Constraint Mapping Compliance Logic 3 RealWorld Motivations 4 Consequences of Deviation 5 Note on Model Quirks Introduction StepbyStep Flow How Constraints Enforce Order RealWorld Motivations Consequences Conclusion All aligned with the prompt

Name: Hypothesis Generation - IND
Text: Draft carefully StepbyStep Flow Step 1 Intake Initiation Step 2 Initial Risk Screening Step 3 Documentation Coexistence Step 4 Quality Compliance Gate Step 5 Offer Assembly Direct Disbursement Step 6 Authorization Notification Step 7 Absolute Prohibitions Exclusions Emphasize declaratives nature constraints vs rigid sequences
